arts.ttl: Why Liverpool aren't on TNT as Amazon Prime Champions League TV coverage explained
arts.sum: Liverpool have at least quarter of their Champions League matches during the League phase of the competition on Amazon's Prime Video streaming service rather than TNT Sports

arts.ttl: Milan vs Liverpool: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: It's Arne Slot's Champions League debut as Liverpool head coach and the Dutchman will want to see significant improvements from Saturday's 1-0 home defeat to Nottingham Forest. Liverpool and Milan have plenty of history from the noughties, with two Champions League final encounters, but their most recent meetings came in 2021/22.

arts.ttl: The fixture which shows football’s changing face - and how AC Milan got left behind
arts.sum: The Rossoneri and Liverpool met in the finals of 2005 and 2007; in 2024 they meet in the opening fixture of a brand new Champions League format

arts.ttl: The vital question behind Arne Slot’s hopes of following Liverpool’s Champions League giants
arts.sum: The Reds travel to Milan, to provoke memories from one of their greatest European nights, with Arne Slot desperate for a reaction after a shock setback against Nottingham Forest last weekend

arts.sum: Both Arsenal and Liverpool should be pleased with the way in which they’ve started the 2024/25 Premier League season.
